---
title: 'Double for our Trouble!'
date: '2012-11-17T13:08:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5202106681775963171'
blogger_filename: '/2012/11/double-for-our-trouble.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<h4 style="text-align: center;">
Double for our Trouble!&nbsp;</h4>
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>Father, I thank you for replacing, doubling, and upgrading us to two new cars. 11/17/2012</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Update on 11/26/2012
Within Two Weeks we had two debt free cars in better mechanical condition than the one we lost, GLORY! Answers!</li>
</ul>
